chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.34 of 2021 Siddiqsons Limited & others Versus Creek Marina Singapore Pte Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2057/23 2. For orders on office objection/reply at “A” 3. For orders on CMA 541/21 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA 542/23 Statement filed by advocate for appellants. Dated: 15.12.2023 Ms. Mehak Asghar for appellants. -.-.- It seems that application for withdrawal of Vakalatnama was filed and the notices have been issued to the appellants, which copies have been placed on record along with affidavit and a copy that was forwarded to the appellants disclosing today’s date. Since no one has appeared on behalf of the appellants despite the notice having been served upon them, it seems that they have lost interest in the instant proceedings. Accordingly, not only the application for withdrawal of Vakalatnama is allowed, instant High Court Appeal is also dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
